title: AQUA cloning
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7teer","text":"Protocol for seamless, scarless, homology-based cloning of vectors using an enzyme-free technique. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"62d09","text":"The method was published by Zurbriggen et al., 2015, doi: 10.1371/journal.pone.0137652","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":58,"length":28}],"data":[]},{"key":"7h1t9","text":"It relies on the endogenous homologous recombination machinery of E. coli lab strains.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":66,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"3179AE78577147AFAD3C29FB5305F0AC","url":"https://dx.doi.org/10.1371%2Fjournal.pone.0137652"}}}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"al8bp","text":"Make sure to recover high concentrations of fragments.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Primer design for assembly-based cloning by Anna Behle
Create PCR products of all the fragments that are to be assembled, using the appropriate primers. Homologous overhangs should range between 16 and 32 bp.
Optional when using pSHDY or other large backbone: Digest backbone using appropriate restriction enzymes. ( Note: AQUA assembly using digested backbone is less efficient.)
Gel-extract PCR and backbone fragments using the Nucleo-Spin kit. Make sure to recover high amounts. ( Note: PCR clean-up alone is insufficient due to backbone templates yielding false positives. )
In a 10 to 15 µL reaction, mix fragments with molar ratios of 3:1 (insert:vector) or more for 2-fragment assembly or equimolar ratios for 3 or more fragments.
Incubate reaction at RT for 1 hour. 01:00:00

Transform appropriate reaction volume into chemically competent DH5α cells. (Note: Best results are achieved using commercially available competent .) NEB 5-alpha Competent E.coli (High Efficiency) - 20x0.05 ml New England Biolabs Catalog #C2987H

Centrifuge transformation mix at 2500 rpm for 2 minutes. Remove supernatant; resuspend pellet in 100 µL LB. Plate entire amount of cells on LB-plate containing appropriate antibiotics. Incubate over night at 37 °C. 00:02:00
Test clones using restriction analysis or colony PCR. ( Note: For colony PCR, use primers that amplify a region spanning two assembled fragments to avoid false positives. )
creator: Anna Behle
